title: calyptraria mutisii
intro: Calyptraria mutisii, also known as the Mutis' calyptra or Rock calyptra, is a type of flowering plant species in the family Calyptrigiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calyptraria mutisii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Calyptraria mutisii can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications to promote skin healing.
